campaigns.title: Contractor Cash Flow Readiness Campaign
campaigns.offer: Help contractors identify cash flow gaps before payroll, materials, or receivables create pressure.
campaigns.copy_angle: Stop waiting until the job is on fire. Find the cash flow gap while it is still small enough to fix.
campaigns.tracking_notes: Use partner_id prt_20260706_001 and campaign_id cmp_contractor_cash_flow_readiness when tracking links are available.

campaigns.title: Veteran-Owned Business Readiness Check
campaigns.offer: Educational readiness review for business owners who want cleaner funding conversations and better prepared documents.
campaigns.copy_angle: Bring the paperwork squared away before you go looking for capital. Chaos is not a business plan.
campaigns.tracking_notes: Use only after partner confirms veteran/community audience access.
